description: uses nested loops to repeat sections of a song
evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The workspace contains at least three repeat blocks with an outer-loop to repeat multiple tracks playing together, and at least two inner-loops to repeat individual tracks

Example:
```
repeat 8
  play_together
    repeat 8
      play "pack/drums_beat_1"
    repeat 4
      play "pack/bass_track_1"
    repeat 4
      play "pack/synth_track_1"
```

Example:
```
repeat 8
  play_together
    repeat 8
      play "pack/drums_beat_1"
    repeat 4
      play_together
        play "pack/drums_track_1"
        play "pack/bass_track_1"
```","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace contains at least two repeat blocks with one nested inside of the other.

Example:
```
repeat 2
  play_together
    play "pack/bass_track_1"
    repeat 2
      play "pack/drums_track_1"
```

Example:
```
repeat 2 
  play_together
    play "pack/synth_track_1"
    play_sequential
      repeat 7
        rest 1 beat
      play "pack/drums_track_1"
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains at least two repeat blocks, but they are not nested inside of each other

Example:
```
repeat 2
  play_together
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"
repeat 4
  play_together
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
    play "pack/bass_track_2"
```}
